summary: Iteration 10 testing completed for Declaracion Anual (Titulo III LISR) and PLD/AML modules. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features working correctly including navigation, dashboard cards, tabs, and CRUD dialogs.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue on initial load, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: POST /api/declaraciones - create declaration with fiscal data (200)
GET /api/declaraciones/{id} - get declaration with calculated fields (200)
GET /api/pld/matriz-riesgo - risk matrix for all donors (200)
Frontend: Declaracion Anual page loads with Nueva Declaracion button
Frontend: Declaracion Anual dialog has year selector, auto-fill, and all form fields
Frontend: Navigation sidebar shows Declaracion Anual and PLD/AML links
Frontend: PLD page loads with 5 dashboard cards
Frontend: PLD page has 6 tabs (Dashboard AML, Ops. Vulnerables, Avisos UIF, Matriz Riesgo, KYC Donantes, Due Diligence)
Frontend: PLD Matriz Riesgo tab shows donor risk scores with Score/Nivel columns
Frontend: PLD KYC tab shows 11 donantes with completion status and Editar KYC buttons
Frontend: PLD Avisos UIF tab shows avisos table with Nuevo Aviso button
Frontend: PLD Due Diligence tab shows bitacora with Nueva Revision button
critical_code_review_comments: Declaracion Anual module correctly implements 10% control validation for actividades no relacionadas
Auto-fill feature properly aggregates donativos by ejercicio fiscal
Remanente ficto calculation includes all 4 components (omision, compras, prestamos, gastos)
PDF generation includes all sections: Ingresos, Deducciones, Remanente, Control 10%
PLD dashboard aggregates stats from alerts, avisos, ops vulnerables, DD, and KYC
Matriz de riesgo auto-scores donors based on PEP, jurisdiction, amount, payment method, KYC
Operaciones vulnerables correctly uses 1605 UMAs threshold ($181,589.70 at UMA 113.14)
KYC update properly tracks kyc_updated_at timestamp
Due diligence validates donante exists before creating entry
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed declaraciones, avisos, and due diligence entries during tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested the new Declaracion Anual (Titulo III LISR) and PLD/AML modules. All CRUD operations work correctly. The 10% control validation properly rejects declarations where actividades no relacionadas exceed 10% of total ingresos. PLD dashboard shows 5 cards with aggregated stats. All 6 PLD tabs work: Dashboard AML, Ops. Vulnerables, Avisos UIF, Matriz Riesgo, KYC Donantes, Due Diligence. KYC has 11 donantes with edit buttons. CFDI timbrado remains MOCKED.

mocked_apis.CFDI_PAC_Integration: CFDI timbrado (stamping) is MOCKED - returns simulated UUID
mocked_apis.Email_Notifications: Email notifications MOCKED - RESEND_API_KEY not configured

features_tested: 10% control validation for actividades no relacionadas
